Off Calendar Oct-27-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:
Cassandra Angel, Esq., for Defendant Desoto Cab Cooperative Company, Inc., Defendant/Moving Party.
John E. Kalin, Esq., for Florentina Umadhay, Plaintiff/Opposing Party
William Ferdinand Terheyden, for In Home Supportive Services, Real Party Interest

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Desoto Cab Cooperative Compay, Inc., Cab's Motion To Compel Discovery is denied as it seeks an order compelling the production of records by the non-party witness, In-Home Supportive Services. Plaintiff is barred from introducing any records from In-Home Supportive Services that she does not produce to Defendant. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
